papers.title_en: Interaction Forces and Internal Loads in Parallel Manipulators with Actuation Redundancy
papers.evidence: 冗余驱动器中合成关节转矩矢量和相互作用力的方法
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了冗余驱动并联机构中的零空间力矩组件，重点分析了交互力和内部负载在这些系统中的应用。针对现有文献中关于这些概念的定义模糊和关键疏忽，本文重新界定了交互力与内部负载，并提出了合成平衡和操纵关节力矩向量的显式方法。通过案例研究验证了新方法的有效性，并纠正了以往研究中的错误结论，为冗余驱动并联机构的力学分析提供了更准确的理论框架。
papers.abstract_en: This paper discusses null-space wrench components in parallel manipulators. We examine the adaptation of the two most common characterizations of these components in grasp-like systems, namely, interaction forces and internal loads, to parallel manipulators with actuation redundancy. We identify critical oversights in the existing literature on the subject, resolve ambiguities related to the definitions of interaction forces and internal loads, and provide explicit methods for synthesizing equilibrating and manipulating joint torque vectors. A case study is also provided to justify the validity of our novel methods and correct erroneous results reported in the literature.
